intro: Push the Souls, Save the Little Pets
description:
Who said the underworld cannot have a cute side?

In Goat Out of Hell: Lost Pets, you take on the role of the hardest-working infernal goat in the underworld, tasked with a very unusual mission: guiding the glowing souls of lost pets to their portals of eternal rest. One push at a time, you must lead each soul through tight corridors, ancient ruins, and lava-lit passages without blocking the path or getting stuck in a dead end.

With 30 short and clever stages divided across three personality-filled biomes, each level is a new puzzle at the heart of the afterlife. From the misty shores of the Styx Riverbank to the reddish depths of Tartarus, and the fiery gates of the Outer Gate of Hell, every setting brings fresh challenges and layouts that demand careful planning and solid reasoning.

There is no ticking timer, no attacking enemies, and no draining health bars here. The only danger is logical: push a soul into the wrong place and the perfect solution becomes a small infernal mess. Fortunately, you can use Undo and Restart whenever you like, testing different routes until you find the ideal path.

Cute, challenging, and surprisingly cosy, Goat Out of Hell: Lost Pets is perfect for players who love strategic puzzles, clever challenges, and that delicious satisfaction of seeing every little soul resting peacefully on its portal at the end of the stage.
